title: Iran holds meeting with US, Qatar on Lebanon, frozen funds: state media

snapshot.title: Iran holds meeting with US, Qatar on Lebanon, frozen funds: state media
snapshot.description: TEHRAN: Iranian state television said on Sunday that delegations from Iran, Qatar and the United States were holding a meeting in Switzerland to discuss a ceasefire in Lebanon and Iran’s frozen assets. “A tripartite meeting involving Iran, the United States and Qatar on the subjects of a comprehensive ceasefire in Lebanon and Iran’s blocked assets is currently being held at
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Iran holds meeting with US, Qatar on Lebanon, frozen funds: state media | Arab News
